title: Shadow Traffic, Canary Rollout, and Progressive Deployment for LLMs

questions.question: What is the right way to order shadow, canary, and A/B testing for an LLM rollout?
options: Shadow (zero-impact compare), then canary (live traffic progressive with gates), then A/B for distinct alternatives once stability is confirmed
Skip shadow entirely
Canary first, then shadow, then A/B
A/B first, then shadow, then canary
questions.question_zh: LLM rollout 中 shadow、canary 和 A/B 测试的正确顺序是什么？
options_zh: 先 shadow（零影响对比），再 canary（线上流量、按门递增），稳定后再用 A/B 比较不同备选方案
完全跳过 shadow
先 canary、再 shadow、再 A/B
先 A/B、再 shadow、再 canary

questions.question: Which set of five metrics does the lesson gate canary progressions on?
options: GPU temp, fan speed, queue depth, cost, latency
Accuracy on offline eval only
Latency percentiles, cost per request, error/refusal rate, output length distribution, user-feedback rate
Just throughput
questions.question_zh: 本课用哪 5 个指标来卡 canary 的递增？
options_zh: GPU 温度、风扇转速、队列深度、成本、延迟
仅离线 eval 的准确率
延迟分位数、每请求成本、错误/拒答率、输出长度分布、用户反馈率
只看吞吐

questions.question: Roughly how much run-to-run accuracy variance does the lesson cite for identical inputs on LLMs?
options: Under 0.1%
Identical outputs run-to-run
Always 50%
Up to about 15%, due to GPU FP non-associativity plus batch-size variance
questions.question_zh: 本课引用相同输入下 LLM 的 run-to-run 准确率方差大约是多少？
options_zh: Run-to-run 输出完全一致
总是 50%
可达约 15%，源于 GPU 浮点非结合性加 batch size 抖动

questions.question: What is shadow mode for, in the lesson's framing?
options: Replacement for rollback
A complete quality test that replaces evals
Final production rollout step
A smoke test catching cost blow-ups, length regressions, refusal changes, and hard errors — not a quality guarantee
questions.question_zh: 在本课的语境下 shadow mode 是用来干嘛的？
options_zh: 代替 rollback
替代 eval 的完整质量测试
最终的生产上线步骤
一种烟雾测试，捕捉成本爆炸、长度回归、拒答变化和硬错误 —— 不是质量保证

questions.question: What is the correct rollback design per the lesson?
options: Wait for the next release window
Redeploy with new model digest, taking hours
Flip a policy flag and revert the pinned model digest in seconds — no redeploy
Manual SSH to each pod
questions.question_zh: 本课认为正确的 rollback 设计是什么？
options_zh: 等下一个发布窗口
用新的模型 digest 重新部署，要花几个小时
翻一个策略开关、把固定的模型 digest 回退，秒级完成 —— 不需要重新部署
手动 SSH 到每个 pod

questions.question: Why is cost listed as a gate alongside latency and quality?
options: A 20% better model can be 3x more expensive per call; shipping that without a cost gate breaks unit economics
Cost is automatically capped by every provider
Cost is a vanity metric
Cost is the same across providers
questions.question_zh: 为什么把成本和延迟、质量并列作为 gate？
options_zh: 质量提升 20% 的模型每次调用可能贵 3 倍；不加成本 gate 就上线会打破单位经济模型
每家供应商都会自动封顶成本
成本是虚荣指标
各家供应商成本一致
